# A1 Lab — Technology Experimentation Lab

> A1 Lab solves business problems fast with the right technology — AI, software, or whatever the problem actually needs. Based in Brazil, serving clients worldwide in Portuguese and English.

## What A1 Lab Does

A1 Lab is a technology research laboratory. You bring a business problem, we investigate, test it in practice, and deliver a working prototype with a technical plan. We recommend whatever actually solves the problem — AI when it fits, software or integrations when they don't.

## Services — Three-Phase Process

1. **Quick Diagnostic (1-2 weeks)** — Understand the problem, map the current workflow, compare approaches, define the best path to prototype.
2. **Working Prototype (2-4 weeks)** — Deliver a functional prototype (e.g., support automation, internal tool, data integration). You see it running, not on slides.
3. **Technical Plan for Decision (1 week)** — Technologies, real costs, and next steps. Everything you need to decide.

One fixed price, one fixed scope. Most projects take 4-7 weeks total.

## Working Rhythm — Four Steps per Project

Every project runs through these four steps. Each leaves you with something concrete.

1. **Kickoff** — 30-min kickoff call, contract signed, then we map your current process with you in a shared Google Doc (you own the link). We agree on comms channel and update cadence upfront.
2. **Research** — Approaches, libraries, APIs, and stacks compared side by side in the shared Doc with tradeoffs. You have comment access throughout and approve the recommended direction before any code is written.
3. **Experiment** — Code in a GitHub repo (ours by default, or yours). Real data when you can share it; mocked data matching the same shape when you can't. Progress updates on the cadence you pick (weekly email by default).
4. **Deliver** — Code handed off through the GitHub repo with a README, technical write-up in Google Docs, production cost breakdown (hosting, APIs, operations) with real numbers. 60-minute handoff call to walk through everything. No technical background required. We stay available for questions after handoff.

## Services (detailed)

### Integrations & APIs
Connect your systems. Stop re-entering data. Sync pipelines, webhook-driven event flows, cross-platform bridges, data pipelines with observability, scheduled reconciliation jobs. Technologies: REST, GraphQL, gRPC; Kafka, SQS, RabbitMQ; OAuth2, JWT, HMAC; PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis.
Service page: https://www.a1lab.com.br/integrations/ · https://www.a1lab.com.br/pt/integracoes-e-apis/

### Document Processing
Read, extract, and classify documents at scale. Invoice extraction, contract analysis, automatic classification and routing, structured output from messy input, resume screening. Technologies: OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral; PaddleOCR, Tesseract, Google Vision, AWS Textract; Scikit-learn, XGBoost.
Service page: https://www.a1lab.com.br/document-processing/ · https://www.a1lab.com.br/pt/processamento-de-documentos/

### AI & Agents
AI that works on your documents and data, not generic chat. RAG assistants with citations, autonomous agents with human checkpoints, classical ML, LLM pipelines with tools, multi-step agent workflows. Technologies: OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral; Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector; LangChain, LlamaIndex.
Service page: https://www.a1lab.com.br/ai-agents/ · https://www.a1lab.com.br/pt/agentes-de-ia/

### Automation & Orchestration
Remove the manual steps. Keep the control. End-to-end workflows, WhatsApp/Instagram/Telegram chatbots, ETL pipelines, web scraping with caching and rate limiting, notification and escalation flows. Technologies: WhatsApp Business, Airflow, Selenium, Playwright, Cloud Functions.
Service page: https://www.a1lab.com.br/automation/ · https://www.a1lab.com.br/pt/automacao-e-orquestracao/

Each service page includes: what we build, technologies we use, a concrete example of how we'd approach a common problem, and FAQ with detailed answers.

## What We Prototype

- Process automation (email triage, ticket routing, automatic replies)
- Document analysis (invoice reading, contract review, report summaries)
- Internal assistants (plain-language Q&A over company data)
- Customer support (WhatsApp bots, appointment booking, lead qualification)
- Software & integrations (dashboards, internal tools, API connections, workflow routing)
- Prediction & analytics (demand forecasting, churn detection, anomaly detection)

## Frequently Asked Questions

- **What does A1 Lab do?** Technology research. You bring a business problem or idea, we investigate, test it for real, and deliver a working prototype with a technical plan so you can decide what comes next.
- **What types of technology do you work with?** AI is what we reach for most often, but we also build software, set up integrations, and automate processes. We recommend whatever actually solves the problem.
- **Do I need a technical team to hire A1 Lab?** No. We're your lab. We do the research and deliver results any manager can understand.
- **How long does it take?** Diagnostic 1-2 weeks, prototype 2-4 weeks, technical plan 1 week. Most projects run 4-7 weeks total.
- **How does payment work?** 50% upfront to start, 50% before final delivery. One fixed price for the full three-phase project.
- **What if the experiment shows the idea doesn't work?** You found out in weeks, not months. That's the point: test before you spend.
- **Is my data safe?** Yes. We sign NDAs when needed and treat everything confidentially.

## Who It's For

Companies with a business problem that needs technology investigation. No technical team required — we deliver results any manager can understand. Startups and larger companies alike.
